message:
refactor: miscellaneous clippy fixes and dead-code removal across codebase

Assorted cleanup spanning multiple modules with no behavioral changes:

- lab/runtime.rs: fix inject_clock_skew to compute old_time from
  virtual_time minus skew; use inline format args in LabScheduler
  debug prints
- grpc/codec.rs: reformat assert_with_log! macro call for line-length
  compliance
- raptorq/decoder.rs: remove unused _tampered_esi binding in test
- net/happy_eyeballs.rs: use RuntimeBuilder (renamed type) and remove
  unnecessary clones of addrs/config before async move block
- tests/database_pool_integration.rs: fix import ordering
  (std::sync::Arc before std::sync::atomic) and reformat long assertion
- tests/e2e/redis/mod.rs, tests/e2e_redis.rs: fix cmd_bytes slice type
  to use explicit fat pointer slices (&b"ECHO"[..]) for consistent
  &[&[u8]] typing
- tests/stream_sink_integration.rs: replace manual loop-match with
  while-let for poll iteration; use Ok::<i32, &str> as method reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
